scripts.build:css: concat-cli -f src/styles/global.css -o dist/styles.css && cleancss -o dist/styles.min.css dist/styles.css
scripts.build:js: concat-cli -f src/scripts/utils/*.js src/scripts/components/*.js src/scripts/app.js -o dist/app.js && esbuild dist/app.js --minify --outfile=dist/app.min.js
